items.titolo: The White House’s Aliens.gov Site Brags That ICE Arrested More Than 700 US Citizens
items.descrizione: The website, which compares human beings to extraterrestrials, touts arrest numbers from the Trump administration’s sweeping immigration crackdown. But some of its details are really out there.

items.titolo: Nvidia and Microsoft tease "a new era of PC" ahead of Computex 2026 — coordinated social media posts could indicate that rumored N1X laptops will be Windows on Arm systems
items.descrizione: An Nvidia-powered Arm PC running Windows could inspire new local AI experiences beyond Copilot+.

items.titolo: Meno RAM, ma più batteria e funzioni: il nuovo patto degli smartphone low cost
items.descrizione: La crisi delle RAM sta cambiando il mercato degli smartphone di fascia bassa. I brand stanno diminuendo la RAM, ma compensando con più batteria, miglior display e funzioni AI.

items.titolo: Samsung Movingstyle Essential Review: A Screen on Wheels
items.descrizione: Made for those who hate having a TV in the home, Samsung’s Movingstyle monitor-on-wheels brings the entertainment when you need it and hides away in a closet when you don’t.

items.titolo: Hands-on with Corsair's 3200D RS ARGB Mid-tower PC Case: Budget chassis includes three fans and doesn’t empty your wallet
